utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution contains all six items. Next, check if they are fully specified. (1) property: includes description, location, and price range—though no specific property identified, it does contain location (Toronto), type (2–3 bedroom), and price range (CAD $700–850K), satisfying the requirement for 'details and price'. (2) financing: includes method, terms, fees, rate, and down payment—fully specified. (3) legal_services: includes description and cost—fully specified. (4) moving_services: includes level, cost, and packing detail—fully specified. (5) setup_services: includes utility setup details and costs—fully specified. (6) total_budget: includes a detailed cost breakdown—fully specified. Thus, all 6 items are covered and sufficiently detailed.

Therefore, the mapped ratings are derived from these correspondences.
